title: Can’t delete Automation Connection
excerpt:
I have a random Automation Connection that can’t be deleted by following the instructions (three dots at the far left give the error “These actions are not available for app connections”). 
There are no Applications curr…

posts.author: JeffJewett (Jeff Jewett)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a random Automation Connection that can’t be deleted by following the instructions (three dots at the far left give the error “These actions are not available for app connections”).

There are no Applications currently installed in my account. How can I delete this in order to cleanup my Automation Connection list?

I get the message shown in the attached screenshot when clicking on “Installed” on the app connection.

IMG_29521217×598 68.4 KB

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m not 100% sure, but I think this automation was created by monday’s Emails & Activities app itself. (In CRM it’s already installed) You can’t delete it directly, but if you go to the developer section and use the API, you technically. However, I wouldn’t recommend doing that, because if the automation was created by the app, it’s likely important for its functioning.

posts.author: JeffJewett (Jeff Jewett)
posts.cookedHtml: I only installed the CRM product as a trial and never used it, it’s since been deleted after it expired. So this is an orphan connection that doesn’t belong in our account anymore, and would like to delete it.

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Click on developer section

image802×920 57.3 KB

then click on API Playground

image2946×1272 153 KB

now run
1)

  webhooks(board_id: YOUR_BOARD_ID){
    id
    event
    board_id
    config
  }
}


mutation {
  delete_webhook(id: "WEBHOOK_ID_FROM_ABOVE_QUERy_RESPONSE") {
    id
    board_id
  }
}
